description_long: This is a modern three-piece sofa set consisting of a three-seater, a two-seater, and a single armchair, all upholstered in a deep burgundy or dark brown leather or leather-like material. The design is sleek and minimalist, with straight lines and a boxy silhouette, giving it a contemporary urban appeal. Each piece features prominent, wide armrests and a continuous, uniform backrest, with seat and back cushions that appear firmly attached and integrated into the frame. The legs are made of polished metal and have a sled base design, providing both stability and a touch of industrial style. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing the clean, modern aesthetic. This set would be well-suited for urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, three-piece burgundy sofa set with smooth leather upholstery, wide armrests, and metal sled legs, featuring a clean, minimalist design. Ideal for urban public spaces or contemporary interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pieces—three-seater, two-seater, and armchair—highlighting the uniform upholstery, wide armrests, and metal sled legs.
description_view_1: Angled view from the left, emphasizing the depth of the seats, the boxy armrests, and the continuous backrest design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted back panels and the metallic sled legs supporting each piece.
description_view_3: Angled view from the right, showing the armchair's back and the side profile of the sofa set, with clear visibility of the armrest and leg structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each piece has a single, continuous seat and back cushion that are firmly attached and uniform in size, with no visible segmentation or loose cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a boxy, rectangular profile with smooth upholstery and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Each piece is supported by two polished metal sled legs, positioned at the corners, with a continuous, bent-tube design that is exposed and adds an industrial touch.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrest is medium-height, straight, and continuous across each piece, with no segmentation, tufting, or decorative features, and is visually integrated with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid-colored, smooth, and untextured, with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
